sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Intraday volume spike lifts KO.SW The Coca-Cola Company to CHF59.76 on 18 Feb 2026: watch CHF61.37 resistance
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company (KO.SW) experienced an intraday volume spike, pushing its stock price to CHF59.76 on February 18, 2026, an increase of 0.83% from the previous day. This unusual trading activity occurred on the SIX exchange in Switzerland, with volume significantly higher than average. Meyka AI gives KO.SW a "BUY" suggestion with a grade of B+ and projects a yearly price target of CHF75.94, indicating a 27.07% upside.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean faces protest related to Perfect Day Mexico project
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean is encountering protests in Mahahual, Mexico, regarding its "Perfect Day Mexico" project. Local residents are demanding that the cruise line fulfill promises for infrastructure improvements in the community that were pledged when Royal Caribbean took over the Costa Maya cruise port. This comes after a temporary halt to construction preparations by a federal judge due to environmental review requirements.

feed.title: Global Payments Looks Forward to a Post-Issuing Era
feed.summary: Global Payments is shifting its focus to acquiring business after divesting its card-issuing unit and acquiring Worldpay. The company aims to expand its Genius point-of-sale service, which is currently "performing exceptionally well," and further invest in agentic commerce. Global Payments also plans to hire 300 more salespeople and leverage Worldpay's distribution to offer Genius in new markets such as the UK.

feed.title: Pool Corp earnings on deck: Can distributor show recovery signs?
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (NASDAQ: POOL) is set to release its Q4 2025 earnings, with investors keenly watching for signs of recovery after a three-year slump in discretionary spending. Analysts anticipate a sequential decline in Q4 earnings and revenue due to winter seasonality but expect year-over-year revenue growth. The market is looking for management's commentary on demand stabilization and early 2026 bookings to assess future prospects, as the company's shares are significantly down from their 52-week high.

feed.title: Keysight Technologies stock hits all-time high at $242.80
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies Inc. stock recently achieved an all-time high of $242.80, marking a 30.56% increase over the past year. This growth is supported by strong investor confidence and the company's solid market performance, with a current market capitalization of $41.55 billion. Keysight has also introduced several new solutions for AI and data center applications, including a GDDR7 transmitter compliance solution, 3D Interconnect Designer, and a strategic partnership with Point2 Technology.

feed.title: UBER: Guggenheim Lowers Price Target While Maintaining Buy Ratin
feed.summary: Guggenheim has reiterated a Buy rating for Uber Technologies (UBER) but lowered its price target to $125 from $135. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook, though other analysts also maintain positive sentiment with varying price targets. Uber's average target price from 48 analysts is $105.26, suggesting a significant upside from its current share price.

feed.title: Macquarie Trims Caesars Entertainment Price Target to $32 From $33, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Macquarie has adjusted its price target for Caesars Entertainment (CZR) from $33 to $32, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for Caesars Entertainment, including Truist lowering its target to $29 and Deutsche Bank to $35, both maintaining Buy ratings. The article also provides recent news and financial data for Caesars Entertainment, highlighting its Q4 2025 earnings which saw revenue rise despite swinging to a loss.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt ‘a little bit more positive’
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt management provided upbeat commentary at a recent investor conference, noting that truck capacity has tightened and demand is slightly exceeding earlier expectations. Despite winter storms and regulatory changes, the company believes significant supply attrition has occurred in the trucking market. J.B. Hunt's dedicated segment saw record new customer agreements, and the company remains confident in its intermodal strategy even if the Union Pacific-Norfolk Southern merger is approved.

feed.title: Navios Maritime Partners LP stock hits 52-week high at 64.33 USD
feed.summary: Navios Maritime Partners LP (NMM) stock achieved a 52-week high of $64.33, reflecting strong investor confidence and favorable market conditions. The company's stock has seen a significant increase over the past year and six months, supported by an impressive gross profit margin and recent financial results that exceeded analyst expectations. Additionally, Navios Maritime Partners announced leadership changes as part of a corporate restructuring.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson to Invest More Than $1 Billion in Pennsylvania Cell Therapy Factory
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson plans to invest over $1 billion in a new cell therapy manufacturing facility in Montgomery County, Pennsylvania. This investment is part of the company's broader commitment to inject $55 billion into the U.S. economy by early 2029. The new facility is expected to create more than 4,000 construction jobs and 500 biomanufacturing jobs.

feed.title: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Downgraded to "Hold" Rating by Erste Group Bank
feed.summary: International Business Machines (IBM) has been downgraded from a "Buy" to a "Hold" rating by Erste Group Bank. Despite this, the consensus among analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $330.07, and several other analysts recently raised their price targets for IBM. The company also reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with revenue up 12.2% year-over-year, and a director purchased 1,000 shares, signaling insider confidence.

feed.title: Republic Services slides as 2026 outlook and revenue come in light despite earnings beat
feed.summary: Republic Services (RSG) stock dropped 4.0% following its latest quarterly report, despite beating EPS expectations. The decline is attributed to lower-than-expected revenue and a modest 2026 guidance, which overshadowed the earnings beat for this valuation-sensitive stock. Management noted continued price-led growth but also volume pressure, raising concerns about underlying demand.

feed.title: Storm-battered Michigan saw 130k fewer power outages in 2025 after grid upgrades
feed.summary: Consumers Energy (NYSE:CMS) completed extensive grid upgrades in 2025, including 2,700 distribution reliability projects, which reduced customer outages by 130,000 and saved $15 million in storm-response costs despite a 20% increase in weather-driven outage events. Eighty percent of customer rate increases over the past five years funded these improvements. The company continues to work towards its goals of keeping outages under 24 hours per customer and limiting single-incident impacts to under 100,000 customers.

feed.title: Humana (HUM) Target Price Lowered by Wells Fargo Analyst | HUM S
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Stephen Baxter lowered Humana's (HUM) target price from $290.00 to $206.00 while maintaining an Equal-Weight rating. This adjustment aligns with similar downward revisions from other firms like Truist Securities, Goldman Sachs, TD Cowen, Cantor Fitzgerald, and Guggenheim. Analysts are recalibrating their expectations for the health insurer's future financial performance, although the average target price from 25 analysts still implies a 26.28% upside.

feed.title: Klarna Group plc Class Action: Levi & Korsinsky Reminds Klarna G
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP reminds investors of Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR) about a pending class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Klarna Group plc made false statements and concealed the risk of increased loss reserves shortly after its IPO on September 10, 2025. Investors who suffered losses have until February 20, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Apple (AAPL) Just Overtook the 20-Day Moving Average
feed.summary: Apple (AAPL) has surpassed its 20-day moving average, indicating a short-term bullish trend and suggesting potential for another rally, especially given its 7% increase over the last four weeks. The company is a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) stock, with positive earnings estimate revisions further strengthening the bullish outlook. Investors should consider adding AAPL to their watchlist due to this technical indicator and favorable earnings revisions.

feed.title: Newmont's Q4 Earnings Expected to Show Strong Growth
feed.summary: Newmont is projected to report strong Q4 earnings with an EPS of $2.02, marking a 44.3% increase, and revenue of $6.25 billion, a 10.6% year-over-year rise, driven by robust gold prices. Analysts maintain a bullish "Buy" rating, citing record free cash flow and new mine launches. The company's stock has significantly outperformed the S&P 500, surging nearly 157% over the past year.

feed.title: 2026 is a turning point for AI enablers – Morgan Stanley’s Michelle Weaver (ARTY:NYSEARCA)
feed.summary: Michelle Weaver of Morgan Stanley predicts 2026 will be a pivotal year for the AI market as companies transition from testing AI capabilities to implementing them in live production environments. This shift signifies a maturation of AI adoption, with 81% of companies anticipating at least one live AI product by the end of 2026. While some roles face automation risk, AI is largely seen as an efficiency multiplier, creating opportunities for software firms in implementation despite existing challenges.

feed.title: Top 5 Information & Business Services Stocks According to Bank of America
feed.summary: Bank of America has identified its top five picks in the Information & Business Services sector, highlighting companies with strong growth potential, recurring revenue, and competitive advantages. The list includes S&P Global (SPGI), MSCI (MSCI), Fair Isaac (FICO), Aramark (ARMK), and NIQ Global (NIQ), all with 'Buy' ratings and specific price objectives. These companies are considered resilient against AI disruption due to proprietary data, high switching costs, and strong market positioning.

feed.title: CF Industries earnings ahead: Can margins hold as prices fall?
feed.summary: CF Industries is set to report fourth-quarter earnings, with analysts expecting a significant jump in EPS and revenue year-over-year. However, concerns are rising about potential margin compression due to normalizing fertilizer prices and increasing natural gas costs, a key feedstock for nitrogen fertilizer. The company is exploring low-carbon initiatives but near-term profitability hinges on navigating a challenging market with expanding global nitrogen capacity and rising input costs.

feed.title: Palantir, Garmin among market cap stock movers on Wednesday
feed.summary: Wednesday's market saw significant movement in various stocks. Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR) and Garmin Ltd. (GRMN) experienced rallies, while others like HollyFrontier (DINO) saw declines. The article provides a breakdown of mega-cap, large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap stock movers, highlighting reasons for their performance such as analyst upgrades, strong earnings, or new product developments.

feed.title: Prudential Financial director Stoddard buys $25,742 in stock
feed.summary: Prudential Financial director Thomas D. Stoddard purchased 250 shares of the company's common stock for $25,742. This transaction occurred on February 17, 2026, and increases Stoddard's direct ownership to 250 shares. The purchase follows news of Prudential's new incentive programs, an impending board appointment, and a voluntary sales suspension in Japan due to misconduct, which has led to revised price targets from analysts.

feed.title: RBC cuts Leidos stock price target on VBA headwinds to $215
feed.summary: RBC Capital has lowered its price target for Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS) to $215 from $230, while maintaining an Outperform rating due to headwinds from a slowdown in VBA activity. Despite a mixed fourth-quarter 2025 performance, the company exceeded EPS expectations and is focusing on defense technology, with RBC anticipating improved revenue growth and margins in 2027. Leidos's stock is currently trading at $161.53 and is considered undervalued according to InvestingPro's Fair Value assessment.

feed.title: HP Inc. drives Real Madrid tech integration for future of work
feed.summary: HP Inc. is partnering with Real Madrid to integrate cutting-edge technology, focusing on enhancing workplace dynamics and driving business growth. The collaboration aims to provide tools that promote efficiency and innovation, framing work environments to resemble play. This initiative highlights how technology supports meticulous preparation, crucial for success both on the field and in modern workplaces.

feed.title: EQT Corp says it has line of sight to nearly 45 GW of data center capacity currently under construction, including 12 GW in its core operating footprint - Conf Call
feed.summary: EQT Corp announced during a conference call that it has identified approximately 45 GW of data center capacity currently under construction. A significant portion of this, specifically 12 GW, is located within the company's primary operating region. This insight suggests potential future demand or opportunities for EQT, a leading natural gas producer.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Expands U.S. Footprint with more than $1 Billion Investment in Next Generation Cell Therapy Manufacturing Facility in Pennsylvania
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson is investing over $1 billion in a new cell therapy manufacturing facility in Montgomery County, Pennsylvania. This investment will expand the company's U.S. manufacturing capacity for advanced medicines, create over 4,000 construction jobs and 500 biomanufacturing jobs, and further strengthen Johnson & Johnson's annual $10 billion economic impact in the state. This initiative is part of a larger $55 billion U.S. investment by the company through early 2029 to manufacture the majority of its advanced medicines domestically.

feed.title: Analysts Are Bullish on These Industrial Goods Stocks: NuScale Power (SMR), Howmet Aerospace (HWM)
feed.summary: This article highlights bullish analyst ratings for NuScale Power (SMR) and Howmet Aerospace (HWM) in the Industrial Goods sector. Craig-Hallum analyst Eric Stine maintained a Buy rating on NuScale Power, while Bank of America Securities analyst Ronald Epstein and RBC Capital maintained Buy ratings on Howmet Aerospace, with strong upside potential. Both companies have received optimistic outlooks from analysts based on their financial performance and market positions.

feed.title: HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ:HIVE) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ:HIVE) reported a record Q3 2026, achieving $93.1 million in revenue and $32.1 million in gross operating margin, despite a net loss driven by non-cash charges. The company emphasized its strategic expansion in both Bitcoin mining (reaching 25 exahash) and high-performance computing (HPC), projecting significant ARR growth for its GPU cloud services. HIVE highlighted its conservative financial approach, focusing on operational efficiency, a strong balance sheet without excessive debt, and a dynamic strategy for Bitcoin holdings to navigate market volatility and capitalize on AI infrastructure demand.

feed.title: FDA reverses course and will review Moderna’s mRNA flu shot, company says
feed.summary: Moderna announced that the FDA has reversed its initial refusal and will now review the company's new mRNA seasonal flu vaccine. The FDA had initially rejected Moderna's application due to concerns about the control arm of its trial. Moderna has since proposed a revised regulatory approach, seeking full approval for adults aged 50-64 and accelerated approval for those 65 and older, with a potential launch for the 2026-2027 flu season.

feed.title: Wingstop Posts Upbeat Q4 Earnings, Joins Caesars Entertainment, Garmin, Sabre And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Wednesday
feed.summary: Wingstop Inc. (NASDAQ: WING) shares surged over 17% after reporting better-than-expected adjusted EPS for Q4, though sales slightly missed estimates. Several other companies, including Caesars Entertainment, Garmin, and Sabre, also saw significant gains on Wednesday due to strong earnings and positive corporate news. The overall U.S. stock market experienced an uptick, with the Dow Jones index rising by approximately 250 points.

feed.title: J.M. Smucker to Invest $20.5M in Kansas Pet Food Plant
feed.summary: The J.M. Smucker Co., through its subsidiary Big Heart Pet Brands, Inc., is investing $20.5 million to expand its pet food manufacturing facility in Topeka, Kansas. The investment includes $17.8 million in real property and $2.7 million in equipment, supported by $383,000 in economic development incentives from local authorities. This expansion aims to support the continued growth of popular brands like Meow Mix and Milk-Bone and reinforces Smucker's long-standing commitment to the Topeka community.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Expands U.S. Footprint with more than $1 Billion Investment in Next Generation Cell Therapy Manufacturing Facility in Pennsylvania
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson announced an investment of over $1 billion to build a new cell therapy manufacturing facility in Montgomery County, Pennsylvania. This facility will significantly expand J&J's U.S. manufacturing capacity for its advanced medicines and is expected to create over 500 permanent biomanufacturing jobs and more than 4,000 construction jobs, further boosting Pennsylvania's economy. The investment is part of the company's commitment to invest $55 billion in the U.S. by early 2029 to manufacture the majority of its advanced medicines domestically.

feed.title: AI Claim Assistant Now Taking Auto Damage Claims Calls at Travelers
feed.summary: Travelers Companies has launched its AI Claim Assistant, an intelligent voice service that uses OpenAI model capabilities to handle customer auto damage claim calls. The new assistant provides comprehensive service, guiding customers from consultation through claim submission, offering policy information, and expediting the claims process. Travelers plans to expand the AI assistant to other lines of business and is upskilling call center employees for more strategic roles.

feed.title: A $1B bet on cell therapy: J&J plant to bring over 4,000 Pa. construction jobs
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson is investing over $1 billion in a new cell therapy manufacturing facility in Montgomery County, Pennsylvania. This facility will create more than 4,000 construction jobs and 500 biomanufacturing jobs, bolstering the state's economy and J&J’s U.S. manufacturing capabilities. The investment is part of the company's broader $55 billion U.S. investment plan to produce advanced medicines domestically.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson will spend $1 billion on a cell therapy plant on its campus near Ambler
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson plans to invest over $1 billion to construct a cell therapy manufacturing facility on its Janssen campus near Ambler, Montgomery County, Pennsylvania. This new plant is expected to create 500 jobs and will enhance J&J's capacity to produce cell therapy treatments for various diseases. The investment is supported by $41.5 million in state aid from the Pennsylvania government, highlighting the region's growing hub for life sciences and manufacturing.

feed.title: Insulet Corporation Reports 31% Annual Revenue Growth; Authorizes $350 Million Repurchase Increase
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation reported a 31% increase in annual revenue for 2025, reaching $2.7 billion, driven by strong international sales and expansion of its Omnipod 5 user base. The company also authorized a $350 million increase to its share repurchase program and outlined a strategic roadmap including $1 billion in R&D investment and market expansion. Insulet projects 20-22% revenue growth for 2026 and aims to significantly increase its penetration in the Type 2 diabetes market.

feed.title: EQT Corp says Mountain Valley Pipeline flowed 6% above its nameplate capacity during winter storm Fern - conf call
feed.summary: EQT Corp announced that its Mountain Valley Pipeline performed exceptionally during winter storm Fern, flowing 6% above its nameplate capacity. This operational update was shared during a conference call. EQT Corp specializes in natural gas and also noted its visibility on significant data center capacity under construction.

feed.title: Global Payments stock surges after introducing strong guidance, $2.5B buyback (GPN:NYSE)
feed.summary: Global Payments (GPN) saw its stock climb 10% after issuing a robust outlook for 2026, surpassing analyst expectations for adjusted EPS and net revenue growth. The company's board also authorized up to $2.5 billion in stock buybacks, including a $550 million accelerated share repurchase plan. These initiatives, along with its focus on becoming a pure-play merchant solutions provider, are expected to return over $2 billion to shareholders in 2026 and enhance shareholder value.

feed.title: Emerson at Citi’s Conference: Strategic Focus on Industrial Software
feed.summary: Emerson Electric Company presented at Citi’s Global Industrial Tech & Mobility Conference 2026, highlighting its strategic focus on industrial software and resilience against AI threats. The company emphasized robust growth prospects, strong order momentum, and commitment to returning $10 billion to shareholders. Despite weaknesses in China and Europe, Emerson sees optimism in the U.S. and the Middle East, with R&D investments focusing on AI integration within existing software solutions.

feed.title: Amcor USI Partnership Creates Innovation Program
feed.summary: Amcor and the University of Southern Indiana (USI) have teamed up to launch an innovation program focused on addressing real-world consumer packaging challenges. This pilot internship program, running through USI's Center for Applied Research, will involve seven USI students and Amcor professionals collaborating to develop practical packaging concepts. The initiative aims to provide students with hands-on experience and career development while strengthening the local workforce in the Evansville area.

feed.title: Global Payments Stock Jumps. Here’s Why.
feed.summary: Global Payments (GPN) stock experienced its largest same-day percentage increase in nearly a year following a solid fourth-quarter earnings report and an optimistic outlook for 2026. This surge indicates strong confidence in the financial software provider's future performance. The gains are attributed to both the latest quarterly results and other underlying factors contributing to the positive sentiment.

feed.title: Evinova Announces Strategic Collaborations with Astellas, AstraZeneca and Bristol Myers Squibb Advancing Its AI-Native Platform to Accelerate Global Clinical Development
feed.summary: Evinova has announced strategic collaborations with Astellas Pharma Inc., AstraZeneca, and Bristol Myers Squibb to enhance global clinical development through its AI-native platform. These partnerships involve sharing operational data to improve recommendations and accelerate clinical trials. The platform aims to address fragmented systems and manual processes in drug development, leveraging AI to optimize workflows and reduce costs.

feed.title: PIRELLI CONFIRMED AS A “TOP 1%” COMPANIY IN S&P GLOBAL’S 2026 SUSTAINABILITY YEARBOOK, THE ONLY TYRE MANUFACTURER WORLDWIDE
feed.summary: Pirelli has been recognized as a "Top 1%" company in S&P Global’s 2026 Sustainability Yearbook, making it the only tire manufacturer worldwide to achieve this distinction. This highest level of recognition is based on an analysis of the ESG performances of over 9,200 companies globally, reflecting Pirelli's 86-point score in the 2025 Corporate Sustainability Assessment. The company emphasizes its commitment to sustainable development, technological investment, and transparent value chain management.

feed.title: Monster Beverage stock hits 52-week high at $83.30 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Monster Beverage (MNST) stock recently hit a new 52-week high of $83.30, showcasing a significant 60.75% increase over the past year. This achievement is attributed to strong investor confidence and the company's robust performance, as well as positive outlooks from various investment firms. Analysts have raised price targets for MNST, citing potential for domestic and international growth, strong expansion history, and success in its zero sugar product line.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Is Up 14% in 2026. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go Next
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) stock has risen 14% in 2026 due to strong earnings growth and margin expansion despite a soft demand environment. Analysts project continued growth, with a target price of $445, suggesting the stock is undervalued given its consistent performance, strategic pricing, and market share gains. The company's valuation model, based on revenue growth, operating margins, and exit P/E multiple, indicates a potential 21% upside.

feed.title: Monster Beverage stock hits 52-week high at $83.30
feed.summary: Monster Beverage (MNST) stock reached a new 52-week high of $83.30, marking a 60.75% increase over the past year. This achievement reflects strong investor confidence and company performance, with several investment firms raising their price targets due to optimism about Monster's growth prospects in the beverage sector. Analysts cite potential for domestic and international revenue growth, expansion plans, and success in the zero-sugar product line as key drivers.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories Announces Executive Appointments
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) has announced two significant executive appointments to strengthen its leadership team. Glenn G. Coleman will join as Corporate Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer on April 6th, bringing over 30 years of financial and operational experience in the healthcare sector. Kerry Dailey will join as Corporate Senior Vice President and Chief Legal Officer on March 30th, overseeing legal, compliance, communications, government relations, security, and ESG initiatives.

feed.title: Regions Bank and Worldpay Partnership Boosts Digital Payment Solutions
feed.summary: Regions Bank and Worldpay, a subsidiary of Global Payments Inc., have formed a partnership to enhance digital payment solutions for businesses, leading to a 13.92% surge in Global Payments Inc. stock. This collaboration is expected to streamline transaction processing and is supported by analysts maintaining an 'Overweight' rating for Global Payments, with Baird giving an 'Outperform' rating and a $114 price target. The upcoming earnings report in February is highly anticipated to provide further insights into the company's financial health and strategic growth.

feed.title: JDZG Stock Experiences Volatility Amid Market Shifts and Earnings Disclosures
feed.summary: JIADE LIMITED (JDZG) stock has seen significant volatility, rising by 40.97% amid strategic expansion and innovation announcements. The company's recent earnings report highlights a strong pre-tax profit margin of 41.6% and a respectable price-to-sales ratio, suggesting underlying operational strength and investor confidence despite market fluctuations. Investors are keenly observing JDZG’s strategic moves, which include diversification into new technologies and a manageable long-term debt profile, positioning it for potential future growth.

feed.title: Insights Ahead: Live Nation Entertainment's Quarterly Earnings
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE: LYV) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, February 19, 2026. Analysts project an EPS of $-1.04, and investors will be looking for the company to surpass estimates and provide positive guidance. In the previous quarter, the company missed its EPS by $0.70, which led to a 10.59% drop in share price.
